name: Szechwan Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless sirloin steak, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat clarified butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add steak cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in garlic, shallots, ginger, chili pepper, and chili paste.
4. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring frequently to ensure even cooking.
5. Add the julienned snow peas and sliced green onions.
6. Continue cooking until the vegetables are tender and lightly browned, about 1 minute before serving.
7. Serve hot with rice or noodles. Makes 4 small servings.
